creator: vidwer+fbsdbugs@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 220951
text file with backtrace details gathered by kgdb

This change, see this PRs summary, will crash a machine after inserting wireless USB (if_rsu, RTL8191S, vendor/device ID 0x0bda:0x8172) hardware.
r368738 / de66c99a works fine, as does hardware using if_rtwn_usb (RTL8188EU, vendor/device ID 0x0bda:0x8179).
